news.headline: Contego Medical treats first patients with Neuroguard IEP System, a 3-in-1 device for carotid artery disease in Raleigh, NC.
news.summary: A breakthrough has been achieved by an interventional neuroradiologist and interventional cardiologist who recently conducted the initial commercial procedures using a novel 3-in-1 tool designed for treating carotid artery disease. The milestone was reached in Raleigh, North Carolina, on December 19, 2024, as announced by Contego Medical. This marks a significant advancement in the medical field, with the successful utilization of this unique device.

news.headline: Pure Dental Health in Atlanta introduces zirconia implants as metal-free, biocompatible alternative to titanium implants.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Pure Dental Health has recently introduced zirconia implants as part of their services, catering to patients with metal sensitivities or aesthetic preferences. These metal-free implants are highly biocompatible and offer a more visually appealing option compared to traditional titanium implants. This new offering reflects the clinic's commitment to advancing patient care. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, by Pure Dental Health.

news.headline: Bristol Myers Squibb's stock receives a strong 83 RS rating, surpassing the 80-plus level.
news.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb has achieved an impressive Relative Strength Rating of 83. This indicates a strong performance compared to other stocks in the market.

news.headline: Jabil stock receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade indicating improved technical performance.
news.summary: Jabil recently received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. The upgrade suggests an improvement in the company's standing, reflecting positive growth potential. This development is significant for investors and market analysts tracking Jabil, underscoring the company's strong performance.

news.headline: Nike to reveal fiscal Q2 2025 results soon; anticipated to face challenges as second-worst Dow stock.
news.summary: On Thursday, Nike released its fiscal Q2 2025 results, revealing a challenging quarter for the athletic retailer. As the second-worst performing stock in the Dow this year, investors were eager to hear about Nike's turnaround efforts. Analysts had anticipated a tough quarter for the company. The post on Investor's Business Daily discussed the expectations surrounding Nike's financial performance.

news.headline: Eversource recognized for being among America’s Most Responsible Companies for 6th year by Newsweek.
news.summary: Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES) has been named one of America’s Most Responsible Companies for 2025 for the sixth consecutive year. This recognition by Newsweek and Statista Inc. showcases the company’s dedication to environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) efforts. The award underscores Eversource's strong commitment to sustainability across its operations and a workplace culture focused on embracing values of responsibility.

news.headline: France's PM Bayrou: I would keep open the option of using special constitutional powers to get budget through parliament if needed.
Boyne Resorts partners with Consumers Energy for clean energy, powering Boyne Mountain Resort and Bay Harbor Golf Club.
news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan on December 19, 2024, Consumers Energy and Boyne Resorts revealed a joint initiative to supply Boyne Mountain Resort and Bay Harbor Golf Club with clean energy. This partnership aims to introduce additional renewable energy into Michigan's electricity network.

news.headline: $20,000 awarded to New Jersey nonprofits by FirstEnergy Foundation to benefit vulnerable individuals.
news.summary: Three nonprofits in New Jersey have received a total of almost $20,000 in "Gifts of the Season" from the FirstEnergy Foundation. These organizations are dedicated to assisting vulnerable individuals throughout JCP&L's service area in Holmdel.

news.headline: Havis will demonstrate solutions at NRF 2025 for retail, hospitality, logistics on Jan 12-14, 2025.
news.summary: Havis, a respected company specializing in cutting-edge technology mounting and mobility solutions, will be participating in the NRF 2025 Conference & Expo, scheduled from January 12 to 14, 2025, at the Jacob K. Javits in New York. The event will provide an opportunity for Havis to showcase its latest products and services to a wide audience in the retail industry.

news.headline: Denny's introduces 3 bacon-based menu hacks for holiday party cure ahead of National Bacon Day on December 30.
news.summary: Before National Bacon Day on December 30th, customers have the chance to experience three innovative menu hacks. These new additions cater to bacon enthusiasts and offer a unique culinary experience. Participants can indulge in these limited-time offerings to celebrate the love for bacon in anticipation of the upcoming holiday.

news.headline: Brent Crude Futures settle at $72.88/bbl, down 51 cents, 0.69%.

Stocks slip as strong November retail sales raise concerns over 2025 Fed rate cuts. Retail sales surged 0.7% last month, surpassing estimates, with a 3.8% increase annually; auto sales soared 2.6% monthly and 6.5% YoY. Holiday season spending strong across categories.
news.summary: Wall Street started Tuesday on a weaker note as November's retail sales data showed a 0.7% increase, beating expectations of 0.5%. This marked a significant acceleration from October and saw a 3.8% annual increase, the fastest pace since 2013. Auto sales surged by 2.6% monthly and 6.5% annually. Nonstore retailers, driven by e-commerce, rose by 1.8%. This raised concerns that the Federal Reserve might pause interest rate cuts next year. Wednesday’s Federal Open Market Committee meeting was anticipated for insights into future rate paths. The data illustrated strong consumer spending heading into the holiday season. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Berlucchi celebrates +60% increase in US sales in 2024, highlighted in Times Square.
news.summary: In the concluding months of 2024, Berlucchi is commending its impressive expansion within the US market, showcasing a notable surge of over 60% in sales. This achievement marks a significant milestone for the prominent leader in Franciacorta. Hailing from FRANCIACORTA, Italy, on December 19, 2024, Berlucchi Franciacorta, the trailblazing winery renowned for introducing...

news.headline: Stocks fall ahead of Fed meeting; semiconductor stocks decline amid China's threat. Bitcoin spikes above $107,000. Retail sales rise 0.7% in Nov, 3.8% annually.
news.summary: Midday on Tuesday saw a slight dip in the stock market as investors proceeded cautiously in anticipation of the Federal Reserve’s upcoming policy decision on Wednesday. While a rate cut seemed almost certain, with a 96% probability based on Fed Funds futures, the focus remains on the Fed's forward guidance and Chair Jerome Powell's upcoming comments, especially given the recent strong economic data. Retail sales data for November indicated an unforeseen increase of 0.7% from the previous month, surpassing the projected 0.5%. Yearly sales also jumped by 3.8%, the quickest since December 2023, fueled by robust auto sales. However, semiconductor stocks took a hit due to escalating geopolitical tensions, including China intensifying antitrust investigations into U.S. chipmakers’ acquisitions. Recently, Beijing initiated an inquiry into Nvidia Corp.'s activities.

news.headline: MOCA announces 2025 exhibition schedule with MONUMENTS and Takako Yamaguchi show, among others.
news.summary: Key features of the season include MONUMENTS, a highly-anticipated exhibit that contrasts old Confederate statues with modern artworks, and MOCA Focus: Takako Yamaguchi, marking the artist's debut solo exhibition in Los Angeles. Also noteworthy is the exhibition Diary of Flowers, showcasing artists and their creations. This season promises diverse experiences with a range of artistic interpretations.

news.headline: Jetson Orin Nano Developer Kit by NVIDIA gets major boost, delivering 1.7x improved performance for generative AI tasks at lower cost.
news.summary: The Jetson Orin Nano Developer Kit from NVIDIA has been upgraded significantly, now providing a 1.7 times increase in performance for generative AI tasks. This improved performance comes at a lower cost, making it more accessible to developers.

news.headline: Pantera Bitcoin Fund sees 1,000-fold surge, showcasing rising institutional interest in blockchain, per Pantera Capital's Dan Morehead.
news.summary: Dan Morehead from Pantera Capital has revealed that the Pantera Bitcoin Fund has experienced exponential growth, increasing by 1,000 times since it was established. This significant achievement underscores the expanding institutional fascination with blockchain technology.

news.headline: Wormhole boosts USDC transfers across blockchains with Circle's protocol, offering liquidity and developer integration. Read more.
news.summary: Wormhole is now offering expanded support for Circle's Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol, which allows for smooth transfers of USDC across various major blockchains. This advancement aims to enhance liquidity and streamline developer integration.

news.headline: NVIDIA launches NeMo Retriever for improved multilingual info retrieval, boosting accuracy and efficiency worldwide.
news.summary: NeMo Retriever, the latest technology by NVIDIA, has been launched to improve multilingual information retrieval efficiency and accuracy. This innovative solution aims to tackle data storage and retrieval challenges in global applications. This development is set to revolutionize the way information is accessed and processed, promising significant advancements in this field.

news.headline: NVIDIA's TensorRT-LLM triples Llama 3.3 70B model throughput with advanced decoding techniques. Explore more.
news.summary: Learn about the significant improvement in model inference throughput for the Llama 3.3 70B model using NVIDIA's TensorRT-LLM, which increases processing speed by three times through the implementation of innovative speculative decoding techniques. Explore the full details to understand how this advancement is transforming the capabilities of the model.

news.headline: Investors facing uncertainty as Federal Reserve navigates with no clear direction on interest rates.
Bitcoin's price breaks $100,000 with a $2 trillion market cap, as experts predict a rollercoaster 2025.
news.summary: The value of Bitcoin has soared to a groundbreaking level, surpassing $2 trillion in market capitalization with a price tag of $100,000. Analysts are now deliberating on the future of the cryptocurrency, predicting a mixture of potential growth and instability heading into the year 2025.

news.headline: Brazil CB dismisses concerns on effectiveness of monetary policy amid doubts.
NVIDIA improves code review with fine-tuned small language models, boosting accuracy, lowering costs and latency.
news.summary: NVIDIA has improved small language models (SLMs) to boost accuracy in automating code reviews, cutting costs and latency. This enhancement also prioritizes data privacy.

news.headline: Mexico cuts interest rates for the fourth time in a row as inflation slows down.
Agricultural crisis continues into 2025, impacting AGCO machinery maker - Report.
Investors cherry-pick Trump's proposals, focusing on positives while ignoring negatives in his agenda.
news.summary: Investors and executives frequently highlight their approval of the president-elect's agenda, downplaying any dissent as mere posturing.

news.headline: Silexion partners with Evonik for long-acting siRNA, targeting KRAS-mutated cancers. Collaboration aims for advanced formulation.
news.summary: Silexion and Evonik have teamed up to work on a long-acting siRNA PLGA microparticle formula. This formulation has shown promising results in preclinical trials for KRAS-mutated cancers. The collaboration between the two companies aims to further develop this formulation and potentially offer an effective treatment for this type of cancer.

news.headline: England's largest water company seeks emergency funds amid sewage pollution criticism from watchdog, as nation grapples with water contamination.
news.summary: As England's biggest water company seeks an emergency loan amid a water pollution crisis, a regulatory body has voiced strong criticism. This comes at a time when the country is grappling with significant pollution issues in its water systems.

news.headline: Sale of Big Lots to Nexus Capital collapses, deal worth $800 million at stake.
NVIDIA debuts small language models to enhance digital interactions on RTX AI PCs, aiming for better responses.
news.summary: NVIDIA has unveiled new small language models aimed at enhancing digital human responses, allowing for better interaction with agents, assistants, and avatars on RTX AI PCs. This development aims to improve the overall user experience by providing more realistic and responsive interactions. The introduction of these models is expected to significantly boost the performance and capabilities of AI-powered systems, making them more efficient and user-friendly. This move demonstrates NVIDIA's commitment to advancing AI technology and creating more immersive digital experiences for users.

news.headline: CIBC Innovation Banking funds Landbase with growth capital for AI-powered go-to-market platform. Support for expansion and product dev. Machine learning automates sales/marketing.
news.summary: CIBC Innovation Banking recently announced that it has extended growth capital financing to Landbase, an innovative go-to-market automation platform based in San Francisco and Toronto. The funding package will assist Landbase in advancing its growth initiatives and enhancing product development. Notably, Landbase utilizes artificial intelligence technology to automate sales and marketing workflows effectively. Through its GTM-1 Omni agentic AI model, the company enables businesses to streamline their go-to-market processes by automating prospect research and personalizing messages. This strategic investment aims to bolster Landbase's operations and fuel its expansion in the market.

news.headline: Tech industry makes case for skilled immigrants as Trump considers increasing visas for foreign workers, including Elon Musk's support.
news.summary: Silicon Valley is optimistic that influential figures in the tech industry, such as Elon Musk, will encourage the incoming Trump administration to increase the number of visas granted to highly skilled foreign workers.

news.headline: Trump's cryptocurrency initiative purchases tokens linked to Justin Sun, according to sources.
Better Choice Co. reports repurchasing 102,405 shares at $1.9869/share as part of its $5M buyback program by Dec 16, 2024.
news.summary: By December 16, 2024, the company had bought back 102,405 shares at an average cost of $1.9869 per share through its approved $5 million repurchase initiative.

news.headline: Patrick J. McGovern Foundation to support AI innovation with $73.5 million globally for public institutions and nonprofits.
news.summary: A foundation based in Boston, the Patrick J. McGovern Foundation, has revealed a substantial contribution of $73.5 million towards advancing human-centered AI innovation. This funding will be distributed to support public institutions and nonprofits on a global scale.

news.headline: After Fed announcement, Wall Street faces $6.5 trillion 'triple-witching' test.
France's PM Bayrou: I will present cabinet before christmas.
Star Amon-Ra St. Brown discusses mental health on WeShare® podcast, emphasizing holistic wellness.
news.summary: WeShare®, a prominent provider of Christian health shares, has unveiled a new podcast from Norfolk, Va. In this latest episode, wide receiver Amon-Ra St. Brown delves into his mental health voyage, stressing the significance of balancing physical and mental well-being. The podcast is hosted by mental health advocate Brittney Moses, offering insights into St. Brown's routines and mindset. This move aims to shed light on the broader aspects of health, beyond the football field, garnering attention from listeners.

news.headline: FedEx expected to report $4.06/share in Q2 earnings on Dec. 19, slight decrease from previous year; stock fell 1.5% to $273.16.
news.summary: FedEx Corporation (NYSE:FDX) is set to unveil its fiscal second-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, December 19. Analysts are expecting the Memphis, Tennessee-based company to post earnings of $4.06 per share for the quarter, a slight increase from the $3.99 per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the recent quarter is projected to be $22.09 billion, down from $22.16 billion in the previous year. In the first quarter, FedEx fell short of consensus estimates with adjusted earnings almost 25% below expectations. As a result, FedEx shares dropped 1.5% to close at $273.16 on Wednesday. For more details and the latest analyst ratings on FedEx, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

news.headline: DealerFire emphasizes importance of tracking key website metrics for dealerships to boost sales. Key metrics include page traffic, bounce rate, time on page, conversion rate, mobile vs desktop traffic.
news.summary: In Westlake, Texas, on December 19, 2024, it was highlighted that dealerships have the opportunity to increase sales by closely monitoring specific website metrics. Crucial indicators to track include page traffic, bounce rate, time spent on page, conversion rate, as well as distinguishing between mobile and desktop traffic. By paying attention to these metrics, dealerships can effectively analyze their online performance and enhance their overall sales strategies.

news.headline: Second Avenue acquires Pacific Oak Residential, adds 2,110 homes worth $400 million, with total AUM at $1.5 billion.
news.summary: A full-service single-family rental platform based in Tampa, Second Avenue, has recently acquired Pacific Oak Residential, Inc., a property management company located in Jacksonville. Pacific Oak Residential oversees 2,110 single-family homes worth around $400 million. With this acquisition, Second Avenue's portfolio has grown to 5,300 homes under management, and its assets under management now stand at $1.5 billion. This move not only enlarges Second Avenue's reach but also strengthens its presence in the property management sector.

news.headline: Ed Freedman of Stable Road Foundation wins Chief Digest's Business Excellence Award for 2024 in Maui, among 10 global leaders recognized for nonprofit leadership.
news.summary: In Maui, Hawaii, Ed Freedman, a philanthropist and founder of Stable Road Foundation, was recognized with a 2024 Business Excellence Award by The Chief’s Digest. He was among ten leaders worldwide to receive the honor, given to founders and CEOs who excel in their respective fields. Freedman was specifically acknowledged for his exceptional nonprofit leadership. The Stable Road Foundation team played a crucial role in achieving this recognition.

news.headline: Backflip releases AI model turning text into reality, raises $30M from NEA and Andreessen Horowitz. Co-founded by Greg Mark and David Benhaim.
news.summary: A company specializing in 3D generative AI, Backflip, revealed today that it is coming out of stealth mode after securing $30 million in funding. This funding round was co-led by NEA and Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), with contributions from notable angel investors such as Kevin Scott, the CTO of Microsoft and co-founder of LinkedIn; Rich Miner, the founder of Android and an AI futurist; and Ashish Vaswani, renowned for co-authoring the groundbreaking research paper "Attention is All You Need." The company was founded by CEO Greg Mark and CTO David Benhaim, who were previously known for their work in carbon fiber and met.

news.headline: Renowned courtroom sketch artist William J. Hennessy Jr., known for his vivid illustrations of legal proceedings, passes away at 67.
news.summary: His vibrant illustrations of significant Supreme Court proceedings, impeachment trials, and murder trials provided the public with a unique perspective into settings off-limits to cameras.

news.headline: CPS raises credit facility capacity by $110 million with Citibank, N.A. Total facility now at $335 million.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Nevada on December 19, 2024, Consumer Portfolio Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: CPSS) revealed that on December 16, 2024, it modified its two-year revolving credit contract with Citibank, N.A to boost the facility's capacity. The amendment also encompasses the subordinate third-party lender recently introduced. The revision augments the capacity of the facility from $225 million to $335 million.

news.headline: XRP price down 9%, but traders expect rally. XRP at $2.26, $129.08B market cap. Bitcoin at $98,630.61, $1.95T market cap. Ethereum at $3,474.60, $418.8B market cap. Bull cycle increased XRP 600x, potential $168 peak. More on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Despite a 9% decrease in price, traders of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) are maintaining a positive outlook, with many choosing to hold onto their positions in anticipation of an upward trend. XRP is currently priced at $2.26 with a market cap of $129.08 billion, showing an 8.8% decline in the last 24 hours and a 6.3% decrease over the past 7 days. Comparatively, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is valued at $98,630.61 with a market cap of $1.95 trillion, experiencing a 5.8% drop in the last day and a 2.8% decrease over the week. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is priced at $3,474.60 with a market cap of $418.8 billion, reflecting a 10.5% decline in the last 24 hours and an 11.8% decrease over the past 7 days. Notable crypto trader Javon Marks pointed out XRP's previous surge of 600x and speculates the potential for a similar performance, suggesting a climb of 6,800% to approximately $168.

news.headline: Federal Reserve meeting affects Treasury yields, S&P 500; Trump's agenda a factor, stocks may be 'sloppy.'Characters: 101
news.summary: The recent Federal Reserve meeting caused a significant increase in Treasury yields and a decline in the S&P 500. These movements are closely tied to President-elect Trump's agenda. The market response indicates potential concerns and uncertainties regarding Trump's upcoming policies and their impact on the economy. The Federal Reserve's decisions often have a strong influence on market movements, and in this case, the relationship with Trump's agenda further amplified the effects. As a result, investors are advised to brace for possible volatility in the stock market as discussions around Trump's plans continue.

news.headline: Analyst initiates IonQ coverage with Buy rating and $50 price target, citing superior reliability of trapped-ion qubit architecture.
news.summary: An analyst from D.A. Davidson & Co., Alexander Platt, has started coverage on IonQ, Inc. (NYSE:IONQ) with a Buy rating and a price target of $50. Platt views IonQ as a prominent investment opportunity in the quantum computing sector, benefiting from the limitations of classical computing. The company's trapped-ion qubit architecture is highlighted for its reliability, accuracy, and scalability surpassing competitor designs. This comes amidst challenges faced by industry giants like IBM and Google in terms of inconsistencies and short operational lifespans. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
